home.title: Software Engineer
home.desc: I develop high-performance, scalable web applications with a focus on user experience. I specialize in Vue.js, Python, and real-time system architectures.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: My personal work, academic projects, and professional case studies.

serveR.title: ServeR — Backendless Test Environment for Frontend
serveR.summary_desc: ServeR is a mock/virtual backend solution I designed for frontend teams to maintain development and test automation even if the real backend isn't ready.
serveR.problem_desc: UI development in distributed teams slows down until API contracts are completed. ServeR was developed with the goal of minimizing waiting by supporting a contract-first approach.
design_features: Scenario-based response generation (success, empty data, error, delay, etc.).
Mock generation from schema/contract for REST and GraphQL.
Simulation of real-time event streams (WebSocket / Socket.IO).
Fast switching and reset with CLI & lightweight management layer.
Portable installation with Docker image and CI/CD pipeline.
role_features: Design and development of the core scenario engine.
Writing REST/GraphQL adapters and importing contracts.
Socket.IO based real-time event publish/subscribe infrastructure.
Setting up fixture/seed flows suitable for test automation.
results_features: UI development process became less dependent on the real backend.
Edge-case scenarios and connection issues became visible early.
Practical experience gained in real-time systems, test culture, and corporate code standards.

web.title: Vue Web Sites — Modern Corporate Interfaces
web.summary_desc: I develop modern web sites based entirely on Vue 3 and Vite for corporate clients. These projects aim for high performance, SEO compliance, and mobile-first structures.
web.desc:
Especially in my recent projects, I manage SEO strategies, Google Analytics 4 (GA4), and Search Console integrations end-to-end to increase digital visibility.
Examples: trnyapı.com, rmsyapigrubu.com, peralegal.com.tr
features_list: Modular component architecture with Vue 3 Composition API and TypeScript.
Fast build and development environment with Vite.
Aesthetic and harmonious interfaces using PrimeVue and Tailwind CSS.
SEO optimization and meta tag management.
Axios integration for form processing and data submission.
results_list: Fast and lightweight Vue infrastructure standardized for corporate brands.
Data-driven SEO tracking provided with Google Analytics and Search Console.
High scores achieved in performance measurements (Lighthouse).

larosee.title: La Rosee Sales — Smart Sales & Stock Management
larosee.mobile_desc: The mobile app developed with Flutter manages all operations of the field personnel:

mobile_features.ocr: Smart Reporting: Instant report upload via Google OCR or Excel.
mobile_features.scoreboard: Live Scoreboard: Real-time ranking between personnel based on sales data.
mobile_features.aws: AWS & Twilio: Secure backend running on EC2 and SMS OTP verification.
mobile_features.offline: Offline Sync: Data entry without internet and Firebase synchronization.

larosee.admin_desc: Central command center developed with Vue 3 & PrimeVue for managers:

admin_features.finance: Financial Analysis: Profit/Loss tables and turnover tracking.
admin_features.stock: Integrated Stock System: Inter-branch inventory and barcode tracking.
admin_features.rep: Rep Management: KPI metrics and route analysis.
admin_features.comm: Communication Hub: Sending instant push notifications to the field.

tiki.title: Tiki Taka Toe — 3x3 Strategy with Football Knowledge
tiki.summary_desc: Tiki Taka Toe is a multiplayer mobile game that combines football knowledge and strategy. National teams and clubs are listed on the edges of a 4x4 board; football players who meet both criteria are written in the 3x3 intersection areas in the center.
mechanics_list: Edged of the board: national team and club names in the top/left headers.
Center 3x3 cell: a football player who meets both criteria in the relevant row and column is entered.
When the move is verified, the cell is locked with the X or O mark of the player who made the move.
Winning: forming a vertical/horizontal/diagonal triple; accuracy of information takes priority in a draw.
architecture_list: Flutter (Dart) client: board state, turn management, and verification feedback.
Python-based backend: player–club–national team matching verification engine.
WebSocket lobby: room creation/joining, real-time matching, and turn updates.
Game rules are stored on the server side; invalid moves are immediately rejected.
role_list: Implementation of the Flutter interface and game loop (turn, validity, end).
Development of the Python verification service and WebSocket-based lobby/room architecture.
Management of real-time synchronization and error/edge cases in the competition flow.
learnings_list: Consistency and latency tolerance in real-time room structures and turn management.
Flexible schema for info verification rules and UX against network delays.
Maintaining game flow by simplifying error scenarios in mobile-server communication.

levance.title: Levance CMS — Headless Content Management System
levance.summary_desc: Levance CMS is a headless content management system I built end-to-end, enabling small and medium businesses to manage their websites from a single panel. It features a 4-layer architecture: admin panel, RESTful backend, mobile app, and static site generator.
architecture_list: FastAPI Backend: High-performance async Python REST API with JWT authentication, role-based authorization, and MongoDB Atlas integration.
Vue 3 Admin Panel: Built with Composition API, PrimeVue, and Pinia. Features page editor, media gallery, SEO management, and live preview.
Nuxt 3 Static Site Generator: One-click deploy to Vercel from the admin panel, producing SEO-friendly static websites.
security_list: CI/CD Pipeline: Automated deployment via GitHub Actions; git push = live update.
Rate Limiting: Brute-force protection with slowapi (20 requests/minute).
Security Headers: HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options middleware layer.
Cloudflare WAF: DDoS protection, bot filtering, and SSL (Full Strict).
Atlas IP Whitelisting: Database access restricted to AWS server only.
role_list: End-to-end architecture design and development of the entire system (Backend, Admin, Mobile, SSG).
Containerized production environment setup on AWS EC2 with Docker.
MongoDB Atlas integration and database schema design.
GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline setup from scratch.
Integration of military-grade security layers (WAF, Rate Limiting, IP Whitelisting).
results_list: Multi-site management and instant static site deployment achieved from a single panel.
Zero-touch deployment: code changes automatically go live with git push.
Production environment secured with enterprise-grade security infrastructure.

counpaign.title: Counpaign — Smart Loyalty & Campaign Platform
counpaign.summary_desc: Counpaign is a SaaS product I co-founded and built end-to-end, enabling businesses to manage customer loyalty programs, campaigns, and gift vouchers from a single platform. It features a 3-layer architecture: mobile app, admin panel, and backend. I am the co-founder of this project.
mobile_list: Advanced QR Wallet: Digital wallet to store earned campaigns and vouchers, redeeming them instantly via QR codes.
Twilio SMS & Pinput: Passwordless login and modern SMS OTP screens for secure phone verification.
Live Analytics & Statistics: In-app tracking of spending habits and campaign progress using fl_chart.
Real-Time Notifications: Instant campaign announcements and personalized push notifications via Firebase FCM.
Lottie & Haptic Feedback: Modern micro-animations and haptic (vibration/shake) feedback to enhance UX.
admin_list: Dashboard & Analytics: Campaign performance, customer statistics, and revenue charts with Chart.js.
Campaign Management: QR code generation, gift voucher creation, and customer segmentation.
PDF Reporting: Instant report generation and download with jsPDF.
PrimeVue & Tailwind: Professional and responsive management interface.
security_list: CI/CD Pipeline: Automated lint, build, and SSH deployment to EC2 via GitHub Actions.
Docker & Nginx: Containerized production environment with SSL termination and Gzip.
Helmet & Rate Limiting: Secure HTTP headers and 200 req/15min throttling.
MongoDB Atlas: Cloud database with automated daily backups.
role_list: Co-founder leading product vision, technical architecture, and development process.
End-to-end development of Flutter mobile app, Vue 3 admin panel, and Node.js backend.
Production environment setup on AWS EC2 with Docker and CI/CD pipeline integration.
Integration of third-party services: Firebase, Twilio, and Google Maps.
Design of enterprise-grade security infrastructure (Helmet, Rate Limiting, SSL, CORS).

Producing code that is readable, testable, and compliant with corporate code standards.
